title: [Sponsor] Paper
content:
Paper is a professional design tool where every layer is real HTML and CSS. Your design is already code, which means fewer handoffs and fewer translations between what you design and what ships.

Paper works both ways: code to design, and design to code. Connect any agent through MCP and it can read and edit your designs. Or use Paper Snapshot to capture your live site as editable layers and make new iterations.

Agents handle the tedious work so you can focus on your craft and the decisions that matter.

Try Paper at paper.design.

 ★
